members.member: API for referencing files related to a mod, such as save files.
API for referencing files related to a mod, such as save files.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.Implementation.WukongInputApi.CanApplyInput
member.returns: true if keyboard input is not blocked by active text fields and menus.

members.member: Is the game currently in a gameplay level, as opposed to a menu or the like.
Shows a message on the player's screen, that persists until HideInfoMessage is called.
Shows a message on the player's screen. The message will automatically disappear after the given timeout.
Waits for the given task to complete in a synchronous manner.

member.name: T:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi
member.summary: Provides events related to gameplay, player actions, and multiplayer interactions in Wukong Multiplayer.

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnBeginPlayGameplayLevel
member.summary: Fired when the player enters a gameplay level.

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnEndPlayGameplayLevel
member.summary: Fired when the player leaves a gameplay level, either by exiting to the main menu or by loading another level.

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnLoadingScreenClose
member.summary: Fired when the loading screen is closed after loading a gameplay level.

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnLevelLoaded
member.summary: Fired when a gameplay level is loaded, but before the loading screen is closed. This is a good event to use for initializing custom widgets, so that they are ready to be shown as soon as the loading screen is closed.

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnExitLevel
member.summary: Fired when the player exits a level, either by exiting to the main menu or by loading another level.

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnJoinedArea
member.summary: Fired when the player enters an area.

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnLeftArea
member.summary: Fired when the player leaves an area.

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnPlayerPawnSpawned
member.summary: Fired when the player's pawn (the in-game character they control) is spawned. This can happen when you enter a new area, or when another player connects to the game and their pawn is spawned for you.

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnMainCharacterEntityInitialized
member.summary: Fired when the player's main character ECS entity is initialized and ready. This is fired before , so it can be used to set up things that need to be ready before the pawn is spawned.

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnPlayerChangedTeam
member.summary: Fired when the player changes team, either by rebirthing or by joining a game in progress.

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnLocalPlayerBeforeRebirth
member.summary: Fired when the local player's character is about to rebirth. This is fired before the rebirth actually happens, so the player's character will still be dead at this point.

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnOtherPlayerInsideArea
member.summary: Fired when another player enters the same area as the local player.

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnOtherPlayerOutsideArea
member.summary: Fired when another player leaves the area that the local player is in.

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnConnected
member.summary: Fired when any player connects to the server.

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnDisconnected
member.summary: Fired when any player disconnects from the server, either voluntarily or involuntarily.

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnPlayerDead
member.summary: Fired when any player dies. The first parameter is the player character that died, and the second parameter is the entity that killed them (if applicable).

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnMonsterDead
member.summary: Fired when any monster dies. The first parameter is the monster that died, and the second parameter is the entity that killed it (if applicable).

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongInputApi.CanApplyInput
member.returns: true if keyboard input is not blocked by active text fields and menus.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongLocalApi.IsGameplayLevel
member.summary: Is the game currently in a gameplay level, as opposed to a menu or the like?

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongLocalApi.ShowInfoMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Shows a message on the player's screen.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongLocalApi.ShowInfoMessage(System.String,System.Single)
member.summary: Shows a message on the player's screen for a certain amount of time.
member.param: The amount of time, in seconds, to show the message for.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongLocalApi.HideInfoMessage
member.summary: Hides the message currently being shown on the player's screen, if any.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongLocalApi.AddChatMessage(System.String,UnrealEngine.Runtime.FLinearColor)
member.summary: Adds a message to the in-game chat, visible only to the local player.
member.param: The message to add to the chat.
The color of the message in the chat.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongLocalApi.Wait(System.Threading.Tasks.Task)
member.summary: Waits for the given task to complete in a synchronous manner.

member.name: T:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.WukongApi
member.summary: The main entry point for accessing Wukong's API. Provides access to all of the various APIs and services that WukongMP offers.

members.member: A ReadyActor is an entity that has a mapped Pawn.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Sdk.Entities.ReadyObjectExtensions.<G>$6195CECABC7C3BD151705E592B8D91C0`1.Owner
member.summary: Gets the owner of the entity. This is usually the player that spawned the entity, or a player that was handled the ownership after the original owner disconnected.

members.member: Base class for plugin systems. Adds itself to the update loop on creation and removes itself on disposal.

member.name: F:WukongMp.Sdk.ModSystemBase.UpdateTick.deltaTime
member.summary: The time in seconds since the last tick.

member.name: F:WukongMp.Sdk.ModSystemBase.UpdateTick.time
member.summary: The time at the beginning of the current frame since application start.
